title: Reusable Luxury Product Photo
sourceTitle: Vela Atelier Photo Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable luxury product photo poster with luxury product photo poster with premium material detail, controlled reflections, and elegant campaign layout. Use the attached luxury product photo as the exact product reference. BRAND: VELA ATELIER Design a single high-end editorial poster. Preserve the product exactly as shown, unaltered. Identify the brand and position its authentic official logo with correct proportions and a subtle print texture in the most fitting location. Product Reference: the attached luxury product photo, preserved exactly in shape, material, and color. Fictional Brand: VELA ATELIER. Model Interaction: adult model naturally holding the product near the face without covering key details. Studio. Lighting: deep rich color grade, premium softbox highlights, subtle rim light, and HDR product clarity. Layout Style: single high-end editorial poster with minimal background and generous negative space. Logo Rule: use a fictional refined wordmark with correct proportions and subtle print texture. Subject: Make the attached luxury product photo, preserved exactly in shape, material, and color the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: Use the attached luxury product photo as the exact product reference. BRAND: VELA ATELIER Design a single high-end editorial poster. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use single high-end editorial poster with minimal background and generous negative space. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in luxury product-photo editorial poster visual finish preserving these source cues: preserve uploaded product exactly, premium model/product interaction, minimal luxury editorial poster. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the color system named or implied by the original prompt, anchored by: Use the attached luxury product photo as the exact product reference. BRAND: VELA ATELIER Design a single high-end editorial poster. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
